zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Gare於1402年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。他和Dorothy Savage至少有1個女兒。他去世於1452年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gore
meanings: English: from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece of land’ (Old English gāra, a derivative of gār ‘spear’, with reference to the triangular shape of a spearhead), a topographic name for someone living by a triangular field, or a habitational name from any of various places, for example Gore Court in Tunstall (Kent) and Gore Farm in Hannington (Wiltshire), named from this word.

French: from Old French gore ‘sow’ (a word of allegedly imitative origin, reflecting the grunting of the animal), applied as a metonymic occupational name for a swineherd or as an unflattering nickname.
French: probably also from a pet form of a vernacular form of the personal name Grégoire (see Gregory ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Gare was born in 1402, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Dorothy Savage. He died in 1452, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Gare(은)는 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났다. 그는 Dorothy Savage(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
